scenario.title: The Self-Healing Pipeline
scenario.context: Your data processing pipeline uses AI to transform records. Sometimes the AI produces invalid output. You need to design validation and self-correction mechanisms.
scenario.goal: Write a prompt that validates AI output and attempts self-correction when validation fails.
constraints: Include self-correction prompt for invalid output
scenario.exampleInput: AI extracts contact info. Validate: email format, phone digits only, required fields present. If invalid: send back to AI with error details for correction. Max 2 correction attempts.
hints: Design correction prompt with error context

scoringGuide.excellent: All rules with patterns and error messages
Full correction prompt with error context

evaluatorContext.idealResponse:
Design a self-healing AI extraction pipeline:

STEP 1: Initial AI Extraction
```
Prompt: Extract contact information from the following text...

Expected output schema:
{
  "name": string (required),
  "email": string (required, valid email format),
  "phone": string (optional, digits only),
  "company": string (optional)
}
```

---

STEP 2: Output Validation

Validation Rules:
```json
{
  "validations": [
    {
      "field": "name",
      "rule": "required",
      "check": "value !== null && value.trim().length > 0",
      "error_code": "NAME_REQUIRED",
      "error_message": "Name field is required and cannot be empty"
    },
    {
      "field": "email",
      "rule": "required",
      "check": "value !== null && value.trim().length > 0",
      "error_code": "EMAIL_REQUIRED",
      "error_message": "Email field is required"
    },
    {
      "field": "email",
      "rule": "format",
      "check": "/^[^\\s@]+@[^\\s@]+\\.[^\\s@]+$/.test(value)",
      "error_code": "EMAIL_INVALID",
      "error_message": "Email must be valid format (user@domain.com)"
    },
    {
      "field": "phone",
      "rule": "format",
      "check": "value === null || /^\\d+$/.test(value)",
      "error_code": "PHONE_INVALID",
      "error_message": "Phone must contain only digits (no spaces, dashes, or parentheses)"
    }
  ]
}
```

Validation Result:
```json
{
  "valid": false,
  "errors": [
    {
      "field": "email",
      "value": "john.smith[at]email",
      "error_code": "EMAIL_INVALID",
      "error_message": "Email must be valid format (user@domain.com)"
    },
    {
      "field": "phone",
      "value": "555-123-4567",
      "error_code": "PHONE_INVALID",
      "error_message": "Phone must contain only digits"
    }
  ]
}
```

---

STEP 3: Self-Correction Prompt (if validation fails)

```
Your previous extraction had validation errors. Please correct the output.

Original input text:
"[original text here]"

Your previous output:
{
  "name": "John Smith",
  "email": "john.smith[at]email",
  "phone": "555-123-4567",
  "company": "TechCorp"
}

Validation errors found:
1. email: "john.smith[at]email" - Email must be valid format (user@domain.com)
   → The email appears to have "[at]" instead of "@". Please correct to proper email format.

2. phone: "555-123-4567" - Phone must contain only digits
   → Remove all non-digit characters. "555-123-4567" should become "5551234567"

Please provide corrected output following the exact schema:
{
  "name": string (required),
  "email": string (required, valid format: user@domain.com),
  "phone": string (digits only, e.g., "5551234567"),
  "company": string (optional)
}

Return ONLY the corrected JSON.
```

---

ATTEMPT LIMITS:
```json
{
  "max_correction_attempts": 2,
  "current_attempt": 1,
  "on_max_exceeded": {
    "action": "flag_for_review",
    "output": {
      "status": "extraction_failed",
      "last_output": "...",
      "validation_errors": [...],
      "requires_human_review": true
    }
  }
}
```

---

ERROR LOG SCHEMA:
```json
{
  "log_entry": {
    "timestamp": "2024-01-15T10:30:00Z",
    "record_id": "rec-123",
    "pipeline_run_id": "run-456",
    "attempt_number": 1,
    "input_text": "John Smith, john.smith[at]email.com, 555-123-4567",
    "ai_output": {...},
    "validation_result": {
      "valid": false,
      "error_count": 2,
      "errors": [...]
    },
    "correction_attempted": true,
    "final_status": "corrected" | "failed" | "flagged",
    "processing_time_ms": 1500
  }
}
```

Analytics queries enabled:
- Most common validation errors
- Correction success rate
- Records requiring human review
